package_title: I will generate your legal contracts & proposals from a simple form
description:
🔧 I will generate your legal contracts & proposals from a simple form

I deliver a tailored, legally-structured doc generated automatically from intake answers using DocAssemble + Stirling-PDF + Hermes drafting + your doc-extractor skill — all free.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $50–$300/doc, ~$0 AI cost
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($30, 3 days, 1 rev): Single template, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($120, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 templates, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($240, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited templates, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your document types/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the automation
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
